generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a former civil defense coordinator, I've seen firsthand how underfunded local preparedness programs leave communities vulnerable. The data shows that even modest investments in civil defense infrastructure significantly reduce response times during emergencies. We can't afford to cut corners on public safety—especially when the threats are becoming more complex. #NationalSecurity #CommunitySafety
